title: Mithril Ores and Crafts
description: Add Mythril ores in the minecraft world and their craftings
body:
# Mythril Ores and Crafts

Add Mythril ores in the minecraft world and their craftings

## This mod adds:
- Items (Mythril Ingot, Raw Mythril, Mythril Nugget)
- Tools (Mythril Sword, Mythril Pickaxe, Mythril Axe, Mythril Shovel, Mythril Hoe)
- Blocks (Raw Mythril Block, Mythril Block, Mythril ore Block)
- Armor (Mythril Helmet, Mythril Chestplate, Mythril Leggings, Mythril Boots)

## Compatible with Other Mods (Compatible Tags)

### Languages:
- English (en_us)
- Spanish (es_us, es_es, es_mx, es_ec, es_ve, es_uy)
- Portuguese (pt_br, pt_pt)
- Chinese (zh_cn)
- Russian (ru_ru)

Translated by AI
